items.title: That's an 11-2 Knicks run keyed by Jose Alvarado, Karl-Anthony Towns, OG Anunoby and (checks notes) Jordan Clarkson, who played 5:39 in Game 1 and was a DNP-CD in Game 2. These Knicks reserves stay ready, and the Spurs lead is down to 2, 40-38, with 8:12 to go in the first half.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: That's an 11-2 Knicks run keyed by Jose Alvarado, Karl-Anthony Towns, OG Anunoby and (checks notes) Jordan Clarkson, who played 5:39 in Game 1 and was a DNP-CD in Game 2. These Knicks reserves stay ready, and the Spurs lead is down to 2, 40-38, with 8:12 to go in the first half.

items.title: That Filipino Americans are well represented at the NBA Finals in Spurs rookie guard Dylan Harper and Knicks veteran guard Jordan Clarkson is a source of pride for former San Antonio Mayor Ron Nirenberg.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
That Filipino Americans are well represented at the NBA Finals in Spurs rookie guard Dylan Harper and Knicks veteran guard Jordan Clarkson is a source of pride for former San Antonio Mayor Ron Nirenberg.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Former mayor Ron Nirenberg proud NBA Finals' Filipino representation
media.description: The Filipino American community is well represented on the big stage in the former of the Spurs' Dylan Harper and Knicks' Jordan Clarkson.

items.title: Jordan Clarkson has fond memories of the #Spurs’ championship celebrations during the Tim Duncan era.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Jordan Clarkson has fond memories of the #Spurs’ championship celebrations during the Tim Duncan era.

Now, he hopes to rain on their parade.

On Wagner High grad playing on the big stage in his hometown:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: San Antonio native, Knicks guard Jordan Clarkson hopes to rain on Spurs parade
media.description: The graduate of Wagner has played well against the Spurs throughout his 12 NBA seasons.

items.title: Dylan Harper: “It’s a blessing to represent the Philippines, where I’m from. I think me and Jordan Clarkson are doing a great job doing that.”
items.author: MrBuckBuck
